combined_text_for_llm: If By Rudyard Kipling "Prev Poem Next Poem Famous Inspirational Poem If By Rudyard Kipling Rudyard Kipling was an English poet who lived from 1865-1936. He also wrote many children's stories. The poem's line, ""If you can meet with Triumph and Disaster and treat those two impostors just the same,"" is written on the wall
